---
name: Bug report
about: Report reproducible LinuxMD behavior that appears incorrect
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Describe the observed behavior and what you expected instead.

## Reproduction

List the command, environment, and steps needed to reproduce the problem.

## Relevant output

Include concise logs or report excerpts. Remove API keys, credentials, and sensitive host data.

## LinuxMD version

Provide the output of `linuxmd --version`.
